{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322192447A27B7AD039D838D9046D"}"},"total":1692},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7248105615784182585","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说真的，这本书真的很好看！无敌小队里的每一个人都是全能型选手，睿智冷静的盘姐（姐姐好飒，我好爱[爱慕]），阴险狡诈的闻哥（不是，闻哥，我错了，咱能不能打脸?），可可爱爱的元宝（嘿嘿，呼一把呆毛），杀伐果断的段哥，从容淡定的言言（还有就是言言有时候真的像一只撩人而不自知的狐狸，实名羡慕段哥[撇嘴]）。整本书看下来，CPU都给烧干啦！但是真的好好看，像最后的宇宙试炼场，所有人都团结一心，还有来自华夏的力量，真的很震撼！最后就是希望无敌小队永远走下去，希望他们平安顺遂！","text_exts":[{"e":102,"s":98,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177417868738D9046D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227248105615784182585%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227184231941900602400%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1687581194,"group_id":"7184231941900602400","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"每次不经意的偶遇都是我蓄谋已久的","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+WXigPFEziI64Tu8z7lAiw=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bfb5183841344df394635e83388c54b4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704653&x-signature=gwxABWTGAxCT4OPr0g%2FgLyWh4RI%3D","user_id":"101458089663","user_name":"zi梓"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"101458089663","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7184231941900602400","book_info":{"abstract":"【双强+双男主+无限流闯关+微恐爽文+甜宠】
五人主角团热血闯关，性格鲜明，结局HE
沈言译，华夏仅存的传承道士，实力超群
某天，他踏进了一栋很奇怪的酒店，在这里找到了失踪两年的恋人。
可是恋人莫名失忆，已经全然忘记自己。
沈言译动了动手腕，望向男人的眼神满是兴味。
段牧樊被看的呼吸一滞，内心莫名悸动。
糟糕！难道是心动的感觉？
——
众闯关选手：夭寿啦！段大佬又暴走杀NPC啦！
沈言译：（皱眉）把刀放下。
段牧梵：（下意识放下刀）言言我错了。
众人：？？？

read_item_cnt":"2.8904107e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322192447A27B7AD039D838D9046D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":86,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":28903,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":31930},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7245242293573059362","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一个友情和爱情一样感人的故事，喜欢无敌小队的每一个人:智勇双全的队长言言，最强战力段大佬，刺客程闻，团宠元思，最强辅助医生盘姐。没有一个真正的弱者，哪怕是最弱的元思，都一点点努力跟上大家的步伐。我最爱的还是小队集体给元思找场子的剧情，又感动又好笑又有点爽。
放心大胆的入坑，感情线绝对不虐，大大文笔剧情都在线，非常好看[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1686914483,"group_id":"7184231941900602400","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"佛系懒人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2tof8E/nhZfPnJo/sU7AfR/+6KZCK+y+R3RAHwxLjHm","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2b2687a62dea4bfd9518e95dfcad82da~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704066&x-signature=OpzkKO3bg9bh%2B6boV3rmvPLPj8A%3D","user_id":"3949876823206088","user_name":"玉面文声"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3949876823206088","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1721676318,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7184231941900602400","book_info":{"abstract":"【双强+双男主+无限流闯关+微恐爽文+甜宠】
